nasb.text: If you say in your heart, ‘Why have these things happened to me?’ Because of the magnitude of your iniquity Your skirts have been removed And your heels have been exposed.

esv.text: And if you say in your heart, ‘Why have these things come upon me?’ it is for the greatness of your iniquity that your skirts are lifted up and you suffer violence.

cnv.text: 如果你心裡問： “這些事為甚麼發生在我身上呢？” 這是由於你極大的罪孽； 你的袍子被掀起， 你的下體暴露出來。

ccb.text: 也许你在想：“为什么这些事发生在我身上？” 你的裙子被撕破，你遭受蹂躏， 是因为你罪大恶极。
